subject: Three goblin-like figures in green lab coats — two large flanking goons and a smaller grinning central figure with a mechanical chest piece — standing together in a menacing pose
description: Three squat, goggle-eyed creatures in matching green lab coats stand together against a rust-colored industrial backdrop. The two flanking figures are large and slack-jawed with wild hair; the one on the right holds a small syringe or marker tool. Between them stands a shorter, leering figure with a metallic chest medallion containing a glowing orb, fists clenched and grinning broadly. A letter 'A' patch is visible on one figure's coat and 'Q' on another. The art has a grotesque cartoon quality consistent with Unstable's comedic register. The trio radiates thuggish confidence.
foreground: Three goblinoid creatures in green lab coats, small central figure with glowing chest medallion
emotion: menacing glee, thuggish confidence, slack-jawed goonery
